response_constraints: Base the final answer only on returned tool results; do not imply that a skipped or failed call succeeded.
Respect the stage boundaries: calls grouped as parallel must be issued together in one assistant action, and later calls must wait for the IDs, status, date, or mutation result they consume.
Do not change any record outside the named scope; in particular, leave all fixture distractors untouched.
Do not use extra write or notification tools beyond the single action path explicitly requested.

stages.purpose: Retrieve both supplied IDs in one action before deciding whether either update is safe.
After stage 1 verifies both preconditions, issue the independent scoped updates in one action.

state_assertions: Record shi-268 changes from in-transit to release-ready after verification.
Record shi-668 changes from label-created to in-transit after verification.
Record shi-1068 remains unchanged and no notification is sent.

prompt: Review record shi-268 (Archive photo package) and record shi-668 (Replacement parts parcel) together. After both current records are returned, change Archive photo package from in-transit to delivered and Replacement parts parcel from label-created to in-transit, but only for each record whose retrieved status still matches the stated starting status. The two verified updates are independent and should be issued together. Do not search, cancel, create, or notify. Do not touch similarly named, related, or archived records.
